resources.string: For kernel builds, check defconfig, device tree path, toolchain path, and artifact paths.
The defconfig may not match the selected device, branch, or kernel tree.
Check DTB/DTBO paths, selected device, architecture, and make target.
Check boot, vendor_boot, dtbo inputs, ramdisk path, mkbootimg, and avbtool setup.
Check AnyKernel directory, module files, zip output path, and packaging scripts.
Check compiler input, CROSS_COMPILE, CLANG path, and setup step.
Turnip or Adreno driver build problem
Check Mesa dependencies, Vulkan headers, libdrm, Meson, Ninja, and Android NDK setup.
Android NDK or CMake setup failed
Check NDK version, SDK packages, CMake, and native build inputs.
Clean build outputs or cache, or use a larger/self-hosted runner.
Check executable bits, script permissions, and protected paths.
Check token permissions, private submodules, and checkout credentials.
The build may have failed before packaging, or the artifact path is wrong.
Open the failed log and inspect the lines just above the exit code.
